screen.beyondorbit.uplink.collect_hint: Sneak + empty hand use: collect buffered resources
message.beyondorbit.guide.line2: 1) Craft an Orbital Data Core, then a Basic Satellite and Satellite Uplink.
message.beyondorbit.guide.line3: 2) Place the Satellite Uplink and let it charge, then use a Basic Satellite on it to deploy an automatic mining mission.
message.beyondorbit.guide.line4: 3) For automation, place an Orbital Receiver. It pulls mined satellite buffers into its inventory and stores orbital solar FE for adjacent machines.
message.beyondorbit.guide.line5: 4) For a heavier mission, craft a Rocket Frame, Orbital Mining Module, and Launch Pad, then use a Basic Satellite on the pad.
message.beyondorbit.uplink.no_bodies: No Beyond Orbit celestial bodies are loaded.
message.beyondorbit.uplink.no_satellite: No satellite is linked to this uplink (%s). Use a Basic Satellite on it first.
message.beyondorbit.uplink.not_enough_en: Satellite Uplink needs %s/%s OU before it can deploy a satellite.
message.beyondorbit.uplink.deployed: Satellite %s deployed to mine %s: %s roll(s) every %s tick(s).
message.beyondorbit.uplink.status: Satellite %s is mining %s. Completed extractions: %s. Next extraction in %s tick(s).
message.beyondorbit.uplink.unregistered_: Satellite %s collected only resources that are not registered as items.
message.beyondorbit.uplink.collected: Collected %s item(s) from satellite %s in %s stack(s).
message.beyondorbit.launch_pad.missing_r: Launch Pad requires one Rocket Frame in your inventory.
message.beyondorbit.launch_pad.missing_m: Launch Pad requires one Orbital Mining Module in your inventory.
message.beyondorbit.launch_pad.launched: Launch Pad fired satellite %s toward %s: %s roll(s) every %s tick(s).
message.beyondorbit.orbital_receiver.sta: Orbital Receiver: %s/%s FE stored, %s item(s) in %s/%s slot(s). Sneak + empty hand to collect items.
message.beyondorbit.orbital_receiver.col: Collected %s item(s) from the Orbital Receiver.
